# Lineage Inventory

Trace lineage and inspect data or attribute inventories.

## kiri inventory

Attribute-level inventory operations...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri inventory [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri inventory locale-packs`](#kiri-inventory-locale-packs) - Report conflicts where two patterns claim...
- [`kiri inventory pre-classify`](#kiri-inventory-pre-classify) - Generate one-attribute-per-row...

### kiri inventory locale-packs

Report conflicts where two patterns claim...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri inventory locale-packs [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--locale-pack` | Comma-separated locale packs to inspect for conflicts. | no | en,sv |  |
| `--probe` | Comma-separated canonical column names to probe across the active packs (offline conflict check). | no | email,phone,salary,password,personnummer,lön,address |  |

### kiri inventory pre-classify

Generate one-attribute-per-row...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri inventory pre-classify [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--contracts` | Directory holding ODCS contract YAML files (recursed). | yes |  |  |
| `--output` | Directory to write proposals/ and ai-batch.jsonl into. | yes |  |  |
| `--locale-pack` | Comma-separated locale packs to load. 'en' is built-in; additional packs ('sv', or a path to a YAML file) compose with it. | no | en |  |
| `--confidence-floor` | Heuristic confidence threshold below which a column is queued for the AI batch. | no | 0.85 |  |
| `--domain` | Asset domain tag passed into the AI prompt context. | no | data |  |

## kiri lineage

Trace reporting goals to contracts and...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri lineage [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri lineage drift`](#kiri-lineage-drift) - Reconcile contract-*declared* lineage vs...
- [`kiri lineage goal`](#kiri-lineage-goal) - Walk one goal's full dependency tree -...
- [`kiri lineage graph`](#kiri-lineage-graph) - Bounded lineage graph around ``--urn`` as...
- [`kiri lineage impact`](#kiri-lineage-impact) - List reporting goals that depend on...
- [`kiri lineage summary`](#kiri-lineage-summary) - Per-goal coverage report - how many needed...

### kiri lineage drift

Reconcile contract-*declared* lineage vs...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri lineage drift [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--observed` | JSON file of observed lineage edges (operator-exported UC system.access.column_lineage / OpenLineage). Same wire shape LineageEdge serialises to. Mutually exclusive with --from-uc. | no |  |  |
| `--from-uc` | Read observed lineage live from Databricks Unity Catalog system.access.column_lineage via the configured adapter (no manual export). Requires a UC target. Reconciles TABLE-grain lineage; VIEW-materialised layers are not compared. | no | False |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile from kiri.yml (for --from-uc). | no |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root (defaults to CWD). | no | . |  |
| `--db` | Catalog SQLite (default: <project>/.kiri/catalog.sqlite). | no |  |  |
| `--max-findings` | Cap on reported findings (honest truncation). | no | 200 |  |

### kiri lineage goal

Walk one goal's full dependency tree -...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri lineage goal [OPTIONS] GOAL
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GOAL` | Reporting goal name (metadata.name) | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |

### kiri lineage graph

Bounded lineage graph around ``--urn`` as...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri lineage graph [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--urn` | Seed asset URN (e.g. kiri:asset:silver:customer). | yes |  |  |
| `--direction` | upstream \| downstream \| both. | no | both |  |
| `--depth` | BFS depth cap from the seed. | no | 2 |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root (defaults to CWD). | no | . |  |
| `--db` | Catalog SQLite (default: <project>/.kiri/catalog.sqlite). | no |  |  |
| `--max-nodes` | Node budget (bounded-by-construction). | no | 50 |  |
| `--max-edges` | Edge budget (bounded-by-construction). | no | 150 |  |
| `--json` | Emit the bounded machine graph (5a) instead of Mermaid. | no | False |  |
| `--prose` | Emit Kiri's deterministic plain-text explanation. | no | False |  |
